item.title: What does a Google Ads Specialist do?
item.author: Author
item.description: A Google Ads Specialist is a professional who specializes in creating, managing, and optimizing digital advertising campaigns on the Google Ads platform. Ad specialists are responsible for creating effective campaigns that meet the specific needs of their clients. They must develop strategies to drive traffic to websites, increase brand awareness, and generate leads and sales. Background After graduation, I entered an Internet company responsible for overseas promotion, and after a year, I switched to being an overseas advertising specialist.

item.title: How to Create a Google Ads Campaign
item.author: Author
item.description: For many Google Ads’s beginners, it will be confusing to create a new Google Ads campaign when they hope to start their digital marketing strategy. Here I would like to offer the most detailed step by step guide to create your own first campaign. Before follow the steps bellow, please make sure that you have already own a valid Google Ads account. If you do not have such qualified account, please refer to the official guide and create one.
